examples.title: Algorithm: Access Variable via Pointer
examples.description: Demonstrates basic pointer operations: declaration, address assignment, and value access
examples.code:
ALGORITHM AccessVariable
BEGIN
 DECLARE var AS INTEGER
 DECLARE ptr AS POINTER TO INTEGER
 SET var = 10
 SET ptr = ADDRESS_OF(var)
 PRINT VALUE_AT(ptr)
END
examples.explanation:
1. Declares integer variable
2. Declares pointer to integer
3. Assigns value to variable
4. Assigns variable's address to pointer
5. Accesses value through pointer

examples.title: Basic Pointer Operations in C
examples.description: Accessing variable value through pointer using dereference operator
examples.explanation:
Line 3: Declares integer variable
Line 4: Declares pointer and assigns var's address
Line 5: Dereferences pointer to access value

examples.title: Algorithm: Modify Value via Pointer
examples.description: Changing variable's value through pointer dereferencing
examples.code:
ALGORITHM ModifyValue
BEGIN
 DECLARE num AS INTEGER
 DECLARE ptr AS POINTER TO INTEGER
 SET num = 5
 SET ptr = ADDRESS_OF(num)
 SET VALUE_AT(ptr) = 20
END
examples.explanation:
1. Initializes variable
2. Gets memory address
3. Modifies value through pointer
Demonstrates indirect variable modification

examples.title: Array Traversal with Pointers
examples.description: Accessing array elements using pointer arithmetic
examples.explanation:
Line 4: Pointer points to array start
Line 5-7: Uses pointer arithmetic to access elements
*(ptr+i) equivalent to arr[i]

examples.title: Swapping Values with Pointers
examples.description: Function using pointers to modify variables in different scope
examples.explanation:
swap() parameters are pointers
Dereferencing (*) accesses actual variables
Enables cross-scope modification
